reasoning: The control 'RA-5 (3)' focuses on vulnerability monitoring and scanning, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that images are scanned for vulnerabilities before being deployed. This can be achieved through enabling image vulnerability scanning and using admission controllers to enforce scanning policies. Additionally, setting the image pull policy to 'Always' ensures that the latest image is pulled and scanned.
title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning | Breadth and Depth of Coverage
